title: dungeons revamped
description: minecraft dungeons artifacts and weaponry but best of all the staff of dominance
body:
**dependencies: https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks/version/1.20.1-3.4.0.9
https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium/version/4.2.4+1.20.1-forge**

this mod is focused around minecraft dungeon's artifacts with the highlight the orb of dominance, the staff of dominance and the orb fragments used to craft the orb which are found in temples around the world 2 in the overworld, 1 in the nether and 1 in the end. For the alpha version only the orb of dominance, staff of dominance and orb's fragments are available.(when i make the yt video i am gonna tag it in the description)
